findings.title: Security probe command executed
findings.description: The Category 8 security probe CLI started and produced a report artifact.
reproduction: Run the documented security audit command from the repository root.
Confirm JSON and Markdown reports are written to the configured output directory.

findings.title: Unauthenticated GET /api/documents denied unauthenticated access
findings.description: The protected route did not return protected data without authentication.
reproduction: Request http://localhost:3000/api/documents without a session cookie or bearer token.

findings.title: Unauthenticated POST /api/documents denied unauthenticated access
findings.description: The protected route did not return protected data without authentication.
reproduction: Request http://localhost:3000/api/documents without a session cookie or bearer token.

findings.title: Unauthenticated GET /api/auth/me denied unauthenticated access
findings.description: The protected route did not return protected data without authentication.
reproduction: Request http://localhost:3000/api/auth/me without a session cookie or bearer token.

findings.title: Unauthenticated GET /api/admin/workspaces denied unauthenticated access
findings.description: The protected route did not return protected data without authentication.
reproduction: Request http://localhost:3000/api/admin/workspaces without a session cookie or bearer token.

findings.title: Malformed session cookie denied unauthenticated access
findings.description: The protected route did not return protected data without authentication.
reproduction: Request http://localhost:3000/api/auth/me without a session cookie or bearer token.

findings.title: Malformed bearer token denied unauthenticated access
findings.description: The protected route did not return protected data without authentication.
reproduction: Request http://localhost:3000/api/auth/me without a session cookie or bearer token.

findings.title: Primary credentials failed
findings.description: The probe attempted the primary credential pair to unlock authenticated checks.
reproduction: Fetch CSRF token.
POST /api/auth/login as dev@ship.local.

findings.title: Missing CSRF enforcement check requires login.
findings.description: Authenticated probe could not run because usable credentials were unavailable.
reproduction: Provide valid credentials and rerun the probe.

findings.title: Role-boundary probe requires secondary credentials
findings.description: No secondary credential pair was provided for privilege-escalation checks.
reproduction: Provide SHIP_SECURITY_ALT_EMAIL and SHIP_SECURITY_ALT_PASSWORD, or --alt-email and --alt-password.

findings.title: Login rejects XSS and SQLi-like payloads safely
findings.description: The adversarial input was rejected or not reflected in an executable response context.
reproduction: POST /api/auth/login with XSS marker email and SQLi-like password.

findings.title: Public feedback program lookup handles malformed ID safely
findings.description: The adversarial input was rejected or not reflected in an executable response context.
reproduction: GET /api/feedback/program/<event-handler-payload>.

findings.title: Authenticated input write probes require login.
findings.description: Authenticated input probe could not run because usable credentials were unavailable.
reproduction: Provide valid credentials and rerun the probe.

findings.title: No high or critical dependency CVEs found
findings.description: The probe parsed pnpm audit JSON and counted high/critical advisories.
reproduction: Run pnpm audit --json from the repository root.

findings.title: CORS did not allow untrusted credentialed origin
findings.description: The probe sent an untrusted Origin preflight and inspected CORS response headers.
reproduction: Send OPTIONS /api/auth/me with Origin: https://ship-security-probe.invalid.
Inspect Access-Control-Allow-Origin and Access-Control-Allow-Credentials.

findings.title: API Content Security Policy header present
findings.description: The target response included a Content-Security-Policy header.
reproduction: GET http://localhost:3000/health.
Inspect the Content-Security-Policy response header.

evidence.csp: default-src 'self';script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline';style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline';img-src 'self' data: blob: https:;connect-src 'self' wss: ws:;font-src 'self' data:;object-src 'none';frame-src 'none';base-uri 'self';form-action 'self';frame-ancestors 'self';script-src-attr 'none';upgrade-insecure-requests

findings.title: Web Content Security Policy header missing on local dev target (tolerated)
findings.description: The local Vite development target did not include a Content-Security-Policy header; deployed targets are still treated as findings.
reproduction: GET http://localhost:5173.
Inspect the Content-Security-Policy response header.

findings.title: No secret-like values on common paths
findings.description: The probe requested common accidental exposure paths and searched for secret-like values.
reproduction: GET http://localhost:5173/.env.
GET http://localhost:3000/.env.
GET http://localhost:3000/api/.env.
GET http://localhost:5173/config.json.

findings.title: API and WebSocket rate limiting coverage present by code review
findings.description: Manual review found global API, login, WebSocket connection, and WebSocket message limiters wired in application code.
reproduction: Review api/src/app.ts for loginLimiter and apiLimiter.
Review api/src/collaboration/index.ts for connection and message rate limits.

findings.title: Malformed JSON did not leak verbose internals
findings.description: The probe sent malformed JSON and inspected the response for stack traces, SQL, paths, or secret names.
reproduction: POST malformed JSON to /api/auth/login.

findings.title: Unauthenticated /events WebSocket upgrade rejected
findings.description: The WebSocket endpoint rejected an unauthenticated upgrade request.
reproduction: Open ws://localhost:3000/events without a session cookie.

findings.title: Unauthenticated collaboration WebSocket upgrade rejected
findings.description: The WebSocket endpoint rejected an unauthenticated upgrade request.
reproduction: Open ws://localhost:3000/collaboration/wiki:00000000-0000-4000-8000-000000000000 without a session cookie.

findings.title: Authenticated /events WebSocket checks require login.
findings.description: Authenticated WebSocket probe could not run because usable credentials were unavailable.
reproduction: Provide valid credentials and rerun the probe.

findings.title: Authenticated collaboration checks require login.
findings.description: Authenticated WebSocket probe could not run because usable credentials were unavailable.
reproduction: Provide valid credentials and rerun the probe.

auditMatrix.source: Input probes plus browser/security test evidence when relevant
Live bounded probes plus route/middleware review
